title: DeHaat is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: DeHaat is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
DeHaat invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DeHaat:
DeHaat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat!
